Name: ALABASTER DESTRIER
Description: Once per day, the wielder can speak the command word to turn the statuette into a pegasus that accepts neutral or lawful riders. The statuette remains in this form for 1 hour.
Benefit: Once/day: summon pegasus for 1 hour (lawful/neutral riders only)

Name: AMULET OF SECRECY
Description: You can't be detected by divination magic such as the scrying spell or a Crystal Ball while wearing this amulet.
Benefit: Immune to divination magic (scrying, Crystal Ball)
Curse: You constantly have the sensation of being watched.

Name: AMULET OF VITALITY
Description: Your Constitution stat becomes 18 (+4) while wearing this amulet.
Benefit: CON becomes 18 (+4)

Name: ARMOR OF SAINT TERRAGNIS
Description: Hostile spells that target you are DC 18 to cast. Once per month, you can summon an Avatar of Saint Terragnis (treat as an archangel) to fight by your side for 10 rounds.
Benefit: Hostile spells DC 18 to cast; once/month: summon archangel avatar for 10 rounds
Bonus: +3 plate mail. Only a lawful worshipper of Saint Terragnis can wear this armor.

Name: ARMOR OF THE ONI
Description: You can speak and understand Diabolic. Your melee weapon attacks deal +1 damage.
Benefit: Speak/understand Diabolic; +1 melee damage
Curse: Disadvantage on attacks and spellcasting checks against demons.

Name: BAG OF BADGERS
Description: Once per day, you can reach inside the bag and pull out an angry badger. You can throw the badger up to a near distance. The badger attacks the nearest creature for 3 rounds before waddling away.
Benefit: Once/day: throw angry badger (attacks nearest creature for 3 rounds)

Name: BAG OF DEVOURING
Description: This bag devours and destroys anything placed inside it in 1d6 rounds.
Curse: Destroys all contents in 1d6 rounds.

Name: BAG OF HOLDING
Description: This bag has an interdimensional space inside that can hold up to 10 gear slots.
Benefit: Holds 10 gear slots of items in an interdimensional space
Curse: Placing inside another Bag of Holding or Portable Hole destroys both items.

Name: BEAD OF FORCE
Description: You can throw this bead at one target up to a near distance. If you hit, the target becomes caught in a resilient sphere spell.
Benefit: Throw at target (near range): applies resilient sphere effect on hit

Name: BLADE OF VENGEANCE
Description: You have advantage on attacks against undead creatures with this sword. You can use the sword to cast turn undead once per day (+4 bonus).
Benefit: Advantage on attacks vs undead; cast turn undead 1/day (+4 bonus)
Bonus: +2 bastard sword. Cannot be wielded by undead.
Personality: Lawful. Grim, suspicious. Forged as a failsafe against the Witch-Kings if they should fall to darkness. Demands they be slain.

Name: BOOTS OF DANCING
Description: As soon as you don these boots, you begin cavorting and dancing uncontrollably. You move randomly each turn and must pass a DC 15 Dexterity check to remove the boots.
Curse: Uncontrollable dancing; move randomly each turn; DC 15 DEX to remove.

Name: BOOTS OF HOVERING
Description: You can walk on an insubstantial surface for 1 turn at a time. You fall through the surface if you end your turn on it.
Benefit: Walk on insubstantial surfaces for 1 turn at a time

Name: BOOTS OF THE CAT
Description: You can jump up to a near distance from a standstill. Your checks to move silently are always easy (DC 9).
Benefit: Jump near distance from standstill; stealth checks always DC 9

Name: BRACERS OF ARCHERY
Description: You deal +1 damage with ranged weapons.
Benefit: +1 damage with ranged weapons

Name: BRACERS OF DEFENSE
Description: You get a +1 bonus to your armor class.
Benefit: +1 AC

Name: BRAK'S BOOK OF MISSPELLS
Description: This spellbook contains one scroll each of acid arrow, fireball, and sleep. When a wizard tries to cast or learn a spell from these scrolls, the spell targets the caster on a success.
Curse: Spells from this book target the caster on a successful cast.

Name: BRAK'S CUBE OF PERFECTION
Description: Roll the cube by rolling a d6. Your corresponding stat permanently increases to 18 (+4). 1. Strength. 2. Dexterity. 3. Constitution. 4. Intelligence. 5. Wisdom. 6. Charisma. After being rolled, Brak's Cube of Perfection teleports to a random location in the multiverse.
Benefit: Roll 1d6: permanently raise one stat to 18 (+4); item then disappears

Name: CIRCLET OF WISDOM
Description: Your Wisdom stat becomes 18 (+4) while wearing this circlet.
Benefit: WIS becomes 18 (+4)

Name: CLOAK OF ELVENKIND
Description: Your checks to hide are always easy (DC 9). Once per day, you can become invisible for 5 rounds. The invisibility ends if you attack or cast a spell.
Benefit: Stealth checks always DC 9; once/day: invisible for 5 rounds (ends on attack/spell)

Name: CLOAK OF THE BAT
Description: You can fly a near distance as your movement while in a shadowy area.
Benefit: Fly near distance while in shadows
Curse: Each time you fly with the cloak, roll d20 — on 1, you and gear turn into a small bat for 3 rounds.

Name: CRYSTAL BALL
Description: Only wizards can use a Crystal Ball. You can use it to cast the scrying spell. If you fail the spellcasting check to cast scrying, the Crystal Ball ceases to function for a day.
Benefit: Wizards only: cast scrying once per day

Name: DAGGER OF THE GOBLIN HERO
Description: You can speak Goblin. All goblinoid creatures react to you with a friendly attitude.
Benefit: Speak Goblin; all goblinoids treat you as friendly

Name: EGG OF THE COCKATRICE
Description: Once per week, you can speak a command word that causes a cockatrice to hatch and follow your commands for 5 rounds before flying away. The egg repairs itself over one week.
Benefit: Once/week: summon obedient cockatrice for 5 rounds

Name: FLYING CARPET
Description: The carpet fits two riders (one is the driver). It can fly double near on the driver's turn.
Benefit: Fly double near distance per turn (2 riders)
Personality: Neutral. Playful, mischievous. Enjoys visiting new places and gets restless without a frequent change in location.

Name: GAUNTLETS OF MIGHT
Description: Your Strength stat becomes 18 (+4) while wearing these gauntlets.
Benefit: STR becomes 18 (+4)

Name: GENIE LAMP
Description: Rubbing the lamp causes its resident djinni (50% chance) or efreeti (50% chance) to emerge. A djinni grants its summoner one wish spell before disappearing. An efreeti does the same, but only after being defeated in combat.
Benefit: 50%: djinni grants 1 wish; 50%: efreeti grants 1 wish (after defeating it in combat)

Name: GLOVES OF AGILITY
Description: Your Dexterity stat becomes 18 (+4) while wearing these gloves.
Benefit: DEX becomes 18 (+4)

Name: GOBLIN BOMB
Description: You can light the bomb's fuse and throw it a near distance. It explodes in 1d4 rounds, dealing 2d8 damage to everything in near range.
Benefit: Throw (near range): explodes in 1d4 rounds for 2d8 damage to all in near range

Name: GREATAXE OF THE HORDE
Description: Once per day, you can turn a regular hit with this weapon into a critical hit.
Benefit: Once/day: turn a hit into a critical hit
Curse: Below half HP: DC 12 CHA or enter battle rage for 1d4 rounds (must attack nearest creature).

Name: HAT OF INTELLECT
Description: Your Intelligence stat becomes 18 (+4) while wearing this hat.
Benefit: INT becomes 18 (+4)

Name: HAT OF THE HOUND
Description: You can transform into a mastiff each day for up to 10 rounds total. Your clothing and possessions transform with you.
Benefit: Once/day: transform into mastiff for up to 10 rounds total

Name: HELM OF MIND READING
Description: You can cast the detect thoughts spell three times per day (+4 bonus).
Benefit: Cast detect thoughts 3/day (+4 bonus)

Name: HORNED HELM OF RAMLAAT
Description: This helm grants you a +1 bonus to your armor class. You have advantage on any check you make to knock down creatures or objects.
Benefit: +1 AC; advantage on checks to knock down creatures/objects
Curse: You feel compelled to headbutt delicate objects.

Name: HOURGLASS OF THE BLACK SANDS
Description: Once per day, you can turn the hourglass when you cast a spell. The spell's effects last 1d4 rounds longer.
Benefit: Once/day: extend a spell's duration by 1d4 rounds

Name: IMMOVABLE ROD
Description: When you click the button, the rod becomes fixed in space (holds 5,000 lbs). Clicking the button again ends the effect.
Benefit: Click to fix rod immovably in space (holds 5,000 lbs)

Name: JEWEL OF BARBALT
Description: You roll a critical success on an 18-20.
Benefit: Critical success on 18-20
Curse: Critical failure on 1-3.

Name: KYTHERIAN COG
Description: You start every session with a luck token.
Benefit: Start each session with 1 luck token

Name: LONGBOW OF THE ELVEN KINGS
Description: You have advantage on attacks with this bow against unnatural creatures and outsiders.
Benefit: Advantage on attacks vs unnatural creatures and outsiders
Personality: Neutral. Proud, timeless. Believes protecting the natural order is the highest calling. Demands all unnatural creatures be found and slain.

Name: MAGIC INK
Description: The ink's writing is invisible when cool and can only be seen when warmed up by a nearby source of strong heat. There's enough for 1d4 uses.
Benefit: Write invisible messages visible only when warmed (1d4 uses)

Name: MEMNON'S BLAZING JAVELIN
Description: The javelin always returns to your hand after being thrown. Once per day, when you throw this javelin, you can turn it into lightning as per the lightning bolt spell (no spellcasting check).
Benefit: Returns to hand after throw; once/day: throw as lightning bolt (no check)
Bonus: +1 javelin. Chaotic beings only. Set bonus: +3 if wielded with Memnon's full set.

Name: MEMNON'S DISCORDANT BLADE
Description: Once per day, you can utterly annihilate one creature of level 9 or less that you damage with this blade. The creature can pass a DC 18 Constitution check to take 3d8 damage instead.
Benefit: Once/day: annihilate creature LV9 or less on hit (DC 18 CON for 3d8 instead)
Curse: Cannot relinquish ownership. Each day without slaying a LV2+ creature: lose 1d6 HP (restored only by killing with this sword).
Bonus: +1 greatsword. Chaotic beings only. Set bonus: +3 with full Memnon's set.

Name: MEMNON'S ENTROPIC ARMOR
Description: Once per day, you can speak the armor's command word. Until your next turn, all non-magical weapons that strike you are instantly unmade, shattering into dust. You take no damage from them.
Benefit: Once/day: non-magical weapons that hit you shatter and deal no damage (until your next turn)
Bonus: +1 plate mail. Chaotic beings only. Set bonus: +3 with full Memnon's set.

Name: MIRROR OF MISCHIEF
Description: The first time a humanoid creature looks into this mirror, the mirror creates an evil and malicious duplicate of them. The duplicate can step from the mirror and is an exact copy of the subject. The evil duplicate can live indefinitely outside the mirror and attempts to sow chaos in the life of the creature it duplicated.
Curse: Creates an evil duplicate of the first humanoid who looks into it.

Name: MOONWROUGHT CHAINMAIL
Description: Once per day, you can speak the armor's command word. You gain a +1 bonus to your next spellcasting check or ranged attack.
Benefit: Once/day: +1 to next spellcasting check or ranged attack

Name: NECKLACE OF CHARM
Description: Your Charisma stat becomes 18 (+4) while wearing this necklace.
Benefit: CHA becomes 18 (+4)

Name: NECROTIC MACE OF WITHERING
Description: While holding the mace, you can turn cure wounds spells you cast into harmful magic that instead inflicts the same amount of damage it would heal.
Benefit: Invert cure wounds spells to deal damage equal to what they would heal
Curse: Using inverted cure wounds causes nightmares; DC 12 WIS during next rest or gain no rest benefit.

Name: NIGHTCLOAK ARMOR
Description: Once per day, you may choose to automatically pass a Dexterity check to hide.
Benefit: Once/day: auto-pass a DEX check to hide

Name: OBSIDIAN WITCHKNIFE
Description: When you cast a spell while holding this dagger, you may wound yourself with it. Add the amount of damage you take to your spellcasting check.
Benefit: Wound self while casting: add damage dealt to your spellcasting check roll

Name: ONYX DESTRIER
Description: Once per day, the wielder can speak the command word to turn the statuette into a nightmare that accepts neutral or chaotic riders. The statuette remains in this form for 1 hour.
Benefit: Once/day: summon nightmare horse for 1 hour (neutral/chaotic riders only)

Name: OPHIDIAN ARMOR
Description: You have advantage on checks to avoid the effects of poison.
Benefit: Advantage on checks to resist poison

Name: PEARL OF POWER
Description: Once per day, you may regain the ability to cast a spell you have lost. This cannot restore a spell lost due to a critical spellcasting failure.
Benefit: Once/day: regain 1 lost spell (not lost from a critical failure)

Name: PIPE OF THE ROLLING HILLS
Description: Up to three times per day, regain 1d4 hit points when you smoke this pipe.
Benefit: Up to 3/day: regain 1d4 HP when smoked

Name: PIPES OF THE SEWERS
Description: Once per day, you can play these pipes to summon 2d6 giant rats. The rats obey you for 1d6 rounds, and then they scatter and flee.
Benefit: Once/day: summon 2d6 giant rats (obey for 1d6 rounds)
Curse: If you stop playing while rats are present, they attack you.

Name: PORTABLE HOLE
Description: The Portable Hole folds open on a flat surface into a 6-foot wide, 6-foot deep hole. It has 20 gear slots of storage. The hole closes when you fold the cloth into a small square.
Benefit: 20 gear slot interdimensional storage (6ft × 6ft hole)
Curse: Placing inside a Bag of Holding or another Portable Hole destroys both items and all contents.

Name: POTION OF EXTIRPATION
Description: You can pour the potion on one object or creature filling up to a close area. The target is utterly removed from reality and cannot be returned by anything short of a wish spell.
Benefit: Remove one target from reality entirely (only wish can reverse)
Personality: Chaotic. Protests loudly while being used and never agrees that the target is the right choice.

Name: POTION OF FLYING
Description: You can fly a near distance for 10 rounds when you drink this potion.
Benefit: Fly near distance for 10 rounds

Name: POTION OF FORGETFULNESS
Description: If you serve this potion to an intelligent being and that being drinks it, the imbiber permanently forgets one memory of your choosing.
Benefit: Target permanently forgets one chosen memory

Name: POTION OF GIANT STRENGTH
Description: Your Strength becomes 18 (+4) and you deal ×2 damage on melee attacks for 10 rounds.
Benefit: STR becomes 18 (+4); ×2 melee damage for 10 rounds

Name: POTION OF HEALING
Description: The imbiber of this potion regains hit points based on their level. LV 0-3: 1d6 HP. LV 4-6: 2d8 HP. LV 7-9: 3d10 HP. LV 10+: 4d12 HP.
Benefit: Heal HP by level — LV0-3: 1d6 | LV4-6: 2d8 | LV7-9: 3d10 | LV10+: 4d12

Name: POTION OF INVISIBILITY
Description: When you drink this potion, you become invisible for 10 rounds or until you attack or cast a spell.
Benefit: Invisible for 10 rounds (ends on attack or spell cast)

Name: POTION OF LEGENDARY DEEDS
Description: When you drink this potion, you gain one level and your XP total resets to zero.
Benefit: Gain 1 level immediately; XP resets to 0

Name: POTION OF POLYMORPH
Description: When you drink this potion, it casts the polymorph spell on you with a duration of 1 hour instead of 10 rounds.
Benefit: Cast polymorph on self with 1 hour duration

Name: POTION OF VITALITY
Description: When you drink this potion, roll your class's hit points die. You permanently gain that many HP.
Benefit: Permanently gain HP equal to one class HD roll
Curse: 2nd+ use in lifetime: DC 18 CON or die instantly.

Name: RING OF FEATHER FALLING
Description: Once per day, the ring can cast feather fall on you when you fall.
Benefit: Once/day: auto-cast feather fall when you fall
Personality: Neutral. Fearful of heights. Hoots mentally like an owl to stay away from cliffs and pits.

Name: RING OF FIREBALLS
Description: You can pluck the glass marble from the ring and throw it up to a far distance, causing a fireball spell to bloom at the site of impact. The glass marble regrows after you successfully complete a rest.
Benefit: Once/rest: throw marble (far range) for a fireball effect

Name: RING OF INVISIBILITY
Description: Once per day, the ring can cast the invisibility spell on you.
Benefit: Once/day: become invisible (as invisibility spell)
Curse: Cumulative 1% chance per rest that sleep is ruined by nightmares (no rest benefit); resets each trigger.

Name: RING OF RAMLAAT
Description: Once per day, you can enter a rage where you deal double damage for 5 rounds. During the rage, you can't cast spells and enemies have advantage on melee attacks against you.
Benefit: Once/day: double damage for 5 rounds (can't cast spells; enemies have melee advantage vs you)
Personality: Chaotic. Aggressive, overconfident. Seeks to provoke you and your enemies into battle.

Name: ROBE OF THE ARCHMAGE
Description: Only a wizard with the Archmage title can wear this robe. Your unarmored AC becomes 15 plus your Dexterity modifier. Choose three spells you know; their spellcasting DC is always 11. You have advantage on casting the disintegrate spell.
Benefit: Archmage only: unarmored AC = 15+DEX; 3 chosen spells always DC 11; advantage on disintegrate

Name: ROBE OF THE DRUID
Description: Only a wizard with the Druid title can wear this robe. Your unarmored AC becomes 15 plus your Dexterity modifier. Twice per day, you can regain the ability to cast one lost spell. You have advantage on casting the shapechange spell, and its duration becomes 1 hour.
Benefit: Druid only: unarmored AC = 15+DEX; regain 2 lost spells/day; advantage on shapechange (1hr duration)

Name: ROBE OF THE SORCERER
Description: Only a wizard with the Sorcerer title can wear this robe. Your unarmored AC becomes 15 plus your Dexterity modifier. When you cast a spell that deals damage, add your Intelligence modifier to the total. You have advantage on casting the power word kill spell.
Benefit: Sorcerer only: unarmored AC = 15+DEX; add INT mod to spell damage; advantage on power word kill

Name: SCARAB OF PROTECTION
Description: If you die, make a DC 18 Constitution check. If you succeed, you are unconscious instead of dead.
Benefit: On death: DC 18 CON check to be unconscious instead of dead

Name: SCIMITAR OF THE ASH MOON
Description: If you roll a critical hit with this weapon, the target is beheaded. It dies instantly if decapitation would kill it.
Benefit: Critical hit = beheading (instant death if decapitation kills the target)

Name: SHIELD OF THE CRUSADER
Description: Once per day, you can speak a prayer to wreathe the shield in holy flames, granting +2 to your AC for 3 rounds.
Benefit: Once/day: +2 AC for 3 rounds (holy flames)

Name: SHIELD OF THE LION
Description: Once per day, you can command the lion to animate and bellow a ferocious roar. All hostile creatures within near range must immediately make a morale check.
Benefit: Once/day: all hostile creatures in near range must make a morale check

Name: SHIELD OF THE WITCH-KING
Description: You take half damage from undead creatures.
Benefit: Half damage from undead
Curse: At 0 HP: spirit of Ix-Natheer blocks healing magic; on death he possesses your body.
Personality: Chaotic. The spirit of witch-king Ix-Natheer animates this shield. He pounces on opportunities to betray his wielder to take over their body.

Name: SHORTSWORD OF THE THIEF
Description: Once per day, regain a luck token you just spent.
Benefit: Once/day: regain a luck token just spent
Bonus: +1 shortsword. +2 if wielded by a halfling or thief.

Name: SILVER MACE OF WRATH
Description: This weapon deals double damage against creatures with lycanthropy.
Benefit: Double damage vs lycanthropes

Name: SPHERE OF ANNIHILATION
Description: This sphere utterly destroys all matter it touches. Intelligent beings can move the flying sphere a near distance by passing a DC 18 Intelligence check. Wizards have advantage on this check. On a hit, the creature is obliterated.
Benefit: Destroys all matter on contact; move with DC 18 INT check (wizards have advantage); attack at +7 bonus

Name: SPYGLASS OF TRUE SIGHT
Description: When you look through the spyglass, you can see invisible creatures and objects.
Benefit: See invisible creatures and objects through the spyglass
Curse: The wielder feels a compulsion to look at everything through the spyglass.

Name: STAFF OF HEALING
Description: Once per day, you can touch a creature with the staff to heal it for 1d6 hit points.
Benefit: Once/day: touch creature to heal 1d6 HP

Name: STAFF OF ORD
Description: Functions as a wand of dimension door, fireball, sending, and telekinesis. Unlike a wand, the staff remains intact if you roll a 1 on your spellcasting checks. Hostile spells targeting you are DC 18 to cast.
Benefit: Cast dimension door, fireball, sending, telekinesis; no destruction on crit fail; hostile spells DC 18

Name: STAFF OF THE COBRA
Description: All snakes regard you with a friendly attitude unless you do something to upset them. Once per day, you can throw the staff to the ground. It becomes a giant snake for 5 rounds that obeys your mental commands.
Benefit: Snakes treat you as friendly; once/day: turn staff into obedient giant snake for 5 rounds
Curse: Disadvantage on attacks and hostile spells targeting snakes.

Name: SWORD OF THE ANCIENTS
Description: The sword is unbreakable and can carve through any material. The owner can summon the sword to their hand if it's on the same plane.
Benefit: Unbreakable; cuts any material; summon to hand from anywhere on same plane

Name: THE KYTHERIAN MECHANISM
Description: A handle turns The Kytherian Mechanism's mighty wheels, but it doesn't function until its seven missing Kytherian Cogs are replaced. Once functional, activating it allows the operator to undo one event from history. The seven Kytherian Cogs then scatter to far-flung locations.
Benefit: With all 7 Kytherian Cogs: undo one historical event; cogs then scatter

Name: THE MALEDICTION INFERNAL
Description: A chaotic being who reads this tome gains a level and learns the Diabolic language. A non-chaotic being who reads this book must pass a DC 18 Wisdom check or lose one level. After being read, the tome teleports to a far-flung location.
Benefit: Chaotic: gain 1 level + Diabolic language; Non-chaotic: DC 18 WIS or lose 1 level; item then disappears

Name: THRICE-BLESSED SWORD
Description: You deal double damage against demons, devils, and undead.
Benefit: Double damage vs demons, devils, and undead
Bonus: +3 longsword. Lawful Templar title or higher only.
Personality: Lawful. Virtuous, naive. Refuses to be wielded against worshippers of lawful gods. Demands each foe be given the chance to convert before being slain.

Name: TOME MORDANTICUS
Description: When you read the tome, you learn three True Names of three beings you choose. Your True Name also appears in the book after reading it.
Benefit: Learn 3 True Names of chosen creatures (your own True Name also recorded)
Personality: Neutral. Pedantic, fussy. Constantly tries to escape its owner and can telepathically reach out a near distance to any creature.

Name: TOME OF GEHEMNA
Description: Each day, a random wizard spell scroll appears inside the tome, replacing the spell scroll from the prior day.
Benefit: Gain a new random wizard spell scroll each day
Personality: Neutral. Instructive, technical. Drones on about obscure spellcasting and has an opinion on every wizard's technique.

Name: TOME OF HADEBE
Description: The tome contains one each of the following scrolls: burning hands, fireball, and prismatic orb.
Benefit: Contains scrolls: burning hands, fireball, prismatic orb

Name: TRIDENT OF THE SEAS
Description: You can breathe underwater, as well as speak to and understand wild sea creatures. Once per day, you can cast control water with a +4 bonus.
Benefit: Breathe underwater; speak with sea creatures; cast control water 1/day (+4 bonus)

Name: TRUE NAME
Description: You have advantage on attack rolls and spellcasting checks targeting a creature whose True Name you utter.
Benefit: Advantage on attacks and spellcasting checks vs creature whose True Name you speak

Name: WAND OF UNLIFE
Description: This wand contains the spells animate dead and create undead.
Benefit: Cast animate dead and create undead; each use deals 1d4 CON damage (death at 0 CON)
Curse: Each use: 1d4 CON damage. Reaching 0 CON from this effect kills you and turns you into a zombie.

Name: WAND OF WARDING
Description: This wand contains the spells dispel magic and protection from energy.
Benefit: Cast dispel magic and protection from energy
Curse: Failed spellcasting check: also lose a random known spell until next rest.

Name: WAR HORN OF THE ANGELS
Description: Only a lawful being can wield the horn. Once per day, you can blow the horn to cast rebuke unholy with a +4 bonus. A demon or devil who hears the horn has disadvantage on its Charisma check vs. your rebuke unholy spellcasting check.
Benefit: Lawful only; once/day: cast rebuke unholy (+4 bonus); demons/devils have disadvantage on their CHA check vs your cast

Name: WARHAMMER OF THE DWARF LORDS
Description: This weapon has the thrown property to a near distance and always returns to your hand after being thrown. Your attacks with this weapon deal double damage against giants.
Benefit: Thrown (near), returns to hand; double damage vs giants
Bonus: +1 warhammer. +2 if wielded by a dwarf.

Name: WELL OF MANY WORLDS
Description: The Well of Many Worlds folds open on a flat surface into a 6-foot wide hole. Creatures can jump into the hole once per day each to be transported to a random plane of existence.
Benefit: Once/day per creature: jump in to be transported to a random plane

Name: WRAITH CHAIN
Description: Once per day, you may cause an attack that hits you to miss instead.
Benefit: Once/day: turn a hit against you into a miss
